overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a historical action game showing exploration of an ancient Mediterranean city. The player character walks through riverside colonnades, courtyards with white-plastered buildings, and garden areas with NPCs, then enters a building with marble columns and draped fabrics before returning to the gardens.

events.description: turning away from riverside terrace into courtyard area
beginning to follow an NPC character in a yellow tunic

agents.ego_description: walking along a riverside terrace with stone columns and a bridge, then turning right to follow a path into a courtyard

notable_agents.action: character in yellow tunic with ornate shoulder piece walking ahead on the path

entered.detail: large stone arch bridge spanning the water canal
tall fluted stone column supporting the terrace roof
calm waterway running alongside the terrace
paved walkway with stone balustrade overlooking the water

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit riverside terrace with a large stone bridge in the background. The camera follows a character in a yellow tunic, passing marble columns and turning away from the water into a more enclosed courtyard area.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential courtyard with white and red painted buildings

events.description: ascending a wide stone staircase between white-plastered buildings
passing close to a building wall covered in red flowering vines

agents.ego_description: walking through a busy courtyard with white-walled buildings painted red at the base, ascending a stone staircase alongside other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: man in blue tunic walking up the stairs ahead of the player
woman in brown dress descending the stairs toward the player

entered.detail: two-story building with white plaster walls and red painted base
wide stone steps leading up between buildings
large decorative planters with red flowers

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a bustling courtyard with distinctive white buildings featuring red bases. The player ascends a stone staircase, passing NPCs going in opposite directions, with potted plants and flowering vines decorating the walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: garden courtyard with stone walls and working area

events.description: entering a shaded garden area with workers handling wooden materials
approaching a large wooden doorway entrance

agents.ego_description: walking through a garden courtyard with stone walls and trees, passing workers handling wooden planks near a workbench

notable_agents.action: worker in blue tunic bending over wooden planks on the ground
worker sitting on a stone bench near the wall

entered.detail: tall stone wall with decorative crenellations and rectangular niches
mature trees with dense green canopy providing shade
wooden table with construction materials
large wooden doorway with stone surround leading into a building

segments.scene_description: The player enters a shaded garden area with dense vegetation and a crenellated stone wall. Workers are seen handling wooden materials near a workbench. The path leads toward a large wooden doorway in a white-plastered building.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior courtyard of a noble house with columns and draped fabric

events.description: entering a building through a large wooden doorway into an interior courtyard
ascending side stairs while looking up at the columned balcony with draped fabrics

agents.ego_description: entering a noble house through a wooden doorway, exploring the interior courtyard with marble columns and decorative lattice railings, then ascending side stairs

entered.detail: large wooden door frame with metal studs leading into the building
open courtyard with stone paving and classical architecture
tall white columns with gold banding supporting the upper balcony
decorative stone lattice work on the balcony railing
white fabric drapes hanging between columns on the upper level
narrow stone staircase running up the side of the building

segments.scene_description: The player enters an interior courtyard through a heavy wooden doorway, revealing a space with marble columns, lattice railings, and elegant white draped fabrics. The character ascends a narrow side staircase, passing storage sacks at the top.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper level passages and return to garden courtyard

events.description: exiting the building through a doorway back into the garden courtyard
turning left to follow the garden path along the stone wall

agents.ego_description: walking along an upper level passage with storage sacks, exiting back to the garden courtyard, and continuing along a tree-lined path

notable_agents.action: man in green tunic with decorative belt walking toward the camera on the garden path

entered.detail: large red and beige sacks stacked against the wall
leafy trees in the garden courtyard
tall stone boundary wall with decorative top

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the player navigating narrow upper passages with storage sacks, then exiting back to the garden through a wooden doorway. The character walks along a cobblestone path lined with trees and a crenellated stone wall, passing a man in a green tunic.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright riverside terrace through a series of increasingly enclosed urban spaces before returning to an open garden. It begins by following a character in a yellow tunic past marble columns and away from a large stone bridge, moving from the sunlit waterfront into a bustling courtyard of white buildings with red bases. As the character ascends a stone staircase past flowering vines and NPCs, the scene shifts into a shaded garden area where workers handle wooden materials near a crenellated wall. The camera then follows the character through a heavy wooden doorway into an interior courtyard filled with marble columns and elegant white draped fabrics, ascending a narrow staircase past storage sacks. Finally, the movement leads back outside through another wooden doorway, tracing a cobblestone path lined with trees and a stone wall as the character passes a man in a green tunic.
